tasks.title: World observation exceeded 2s threshold
tasks.suggested_fix: Optimize observer collection or parallelize observers

tasks.title: Memory search exceeded 1s threshold
tasks.suggested_fix: Optimize memory retrieval or add caching
tasks.root_cause: Memory search is inefficient - likely scanning full database without indexing
tasks.recommended_fix: Add vector indexing for semantic search or implement query result caching

tasks.title: Task failed after 3 attempts
tasks.suggested_fix: Improve error recovery or planner retry strategy
evidence: Tool: git_status, Error: Executor error: expected str, bytes or os.PathLike object, not list
Tool: write_file, Error: Guard failed: Permission denied for tool 'write_file'.
tasks.root_cause: Tool implementation error or incorrect usage
tasks.recommended_fix: Review tool implementation and add input validation
